posts.content: if going from 37n to 29n (8º south change) is a gret move, which how could it not be (despite the spraying etc.), think of how much better it is by going from 29n to 12n (17º south change)! 37n to 12n = 25º south change! It's almost triple as strong no?

posts.thread_title: WHAT IS NAD+ IN BIOPHYSICAL TERMS?
posts.author: Jack Kruse
Anthony Smith
posts.content: Walk around the outside and see where it is coming from. Normally one side is the strongest, then look for towers. If no towers on that side close by good chance it is the neighbors WiFi. In single story buildings shielding the fence with wire mesh (metal window screen) can be a quick easy fix.

posts.thread_title: Modeling Through Time: Johan's Notes on Life
posts.author: Johan Lindøm
posts.content: Courage is forward movement while embracing fear. Thinking for yourself is courage. What's rare is the courage to follow it to the dark places where it leads. One person with courage is the only majority you need to succeed in life. Matter organizes itself according to how you think!!
